'''bawasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nympholepsy|nympholepsy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nympholepsy|nympholepsy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bawasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || bæwæsæth || bæwæsæj || bæwæsæsh || bæwæsæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || bawawasath || bawawasaj || bawawasash || bawawasa
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || bawasath || bawasaj || bawasash || bawasa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || bawafsafth || bawafsafj || bawafsafsh || bawafsaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || bawasatha || bawasaja || bawasasha || bawasaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || bawasath || bawasaj || bawasash || bawasa
|-
| [[Possessive]] || bawasathal || bawasajal || bawasashal || bawasakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || bawasaathatha || bawasaajaja || bawasaashasha || bawasaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || bawasathan || bawasajan || bawasashan || bawasakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || bawasathaoro || bawasajaoro || bawasashaoro || bawasakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
